_doc: Recent stakes race results, hand-curated. ZERO FABRICATION rule: every entry cites a primary source URL. Index this by sire (computed at build time) so the platform can surface a stallion's recent progeny stakes wins on the stallion-card and a 'Recent stakes activity' panel on the home page.

_schema.race_grade: G1 / G2 / G3 / Listed / Black Type
_schema.winner_age: Age in years at time of race
_schema.winner_sire: Display name as cited (matches scores.json sire field)
_schema.note: Optional one-line context (e.g. 'won by photo' or 'Derby qualifying points')

_workflow: Append new entries here as stakes races run.

races.note: Stunned favorite Potente. Sire Runhappy was sold to Korea; this colt was conceived in his US tenure. 100 Derby qualifying points.
Won by Irad Ortiz Jr. for Brad Cox in 1:49.58. 100 Derby qualifying points.
Won by a photo finish over The Puma. 100 Derby qualifying points.
